name: MusicAI
description: « Create original songs in seconds using a description, mood, or lyrics. You can also adjust vocals and stems or apply automatic mastering

description: « Turn your idea into a successful business. This tool writes your business plan, establishes your financial projections, and creates compelling presentations to attract banks and investors, effortlessly

description: « Discover the tech career that suits you best with a structured test that assesses your skills, preferences, and strengths, then provides you with clear guidance and an action plan

description: « Generate near-photographic images with professional control, consistent multiple references, and precise placement. Enjoy readable text, exact hexadecimal colors, and resolutions up to 4 MP

name: EnhancePhoto AI
